Table of Contents

Class ClienteMapper

Namespace
BLL.Mappers
Assembly
BLL.dll

Bidirectional mapper between Cliente domain entities and ClienteDTO projections.

public static class ClienteMapper
Inheritance
object
ClienteMapper
Inherited Members
object.ToString()
object.Equals(object)
object.Equals(object, object)
object.ReferenceEquals(object, object)
object.GetHashCode()
object.GetType()
object.MemberwiseClone()

Remarks

ToDTO(Cliente, Membresia, Balance, DateTime?) accepts an optional Balance and proximaFechaPago so the caller can hydrate the DTO in a single pass without additional round-trips. When balance is null, Balance defaults to zero and EstadoBalance is set to AlDia. Unrecognized Estado string values are coerced to Activo and logged as warnings.

Methods

ToDTO(Cliente, Membresia, Balance, DateTime?)

Projects a Cliente entity to a ClienteDTO.

public static ClienteDTO ToDTO(Cliente entity, Membresia membresia, Balance balance, DateTime? proximaFechaPago = null)

Parameters

entity Cliente

Source entity. Returns null when null.

membresia Membresia

Membership entity to embed as MembresiaDetalle, or null.

balance Balance

Current balance record used to populate Balance and EstadoBalance.

proximaFechaPago DateTime?

Next billing date from the active ClienteMembresia row, or null.

Returns

ClienteDTO

ToEntity(ClienteDTO)

Projects a ClienteDTO back to a Cliente entity.

public static Cliente ToEntity(ClienteDTO dto)

Parameters

dto ClienteDTO

Source DTO. Returns null when null.

Returns

Cliente

Remarks

Computed and hydrated properties (Balance, MembresiaDetalle, etc.) are not mapped.
